_meta.title: Denmark Demo — Tier 1 Expected Validation Results
_meta.description: Expected API validation output for all Tier 1 test payloads. Use these to verify your validator implementation produces the correct rule IDs, severities, and messages.

violations.regulatoryRef: Momsbekendtgørelsen § 58 — invoices must identify the supplier by CVR
Momsbekendtgørelsen § 58 — invoices must carry the supplier's VAT registration number

violations.message: IssueDate 2099-12-31 is in the future. Invoice cannot represent a completed taxable supply.
violations.regulatoryRef: Momslovens § 23 — VAT point arises on delivery; a future date has no valid tax point

violations.message: Line 1: Quantity (2) × UnitPrice (15000.00) = 30000.00, but LineExtensionAmount is 28000.00. Discrepancy = -2000.00 DKK.
violations.regulatoryRef: Momsbekendtgørelsen § 58 — invoice amounts must be arithmetically consistent

violations.message: Line 1: LineExtensionAmount (30000.00) × TaxRate (0.25) = 7500.00, but TaxAmount is 6000.00. Effective rate = 0.20. Discrepancy = -1500.00 DKK.
violations.regulatoryRef: Momslovens § 33 — standard VAT rate is 25%; stated rate and computed rate must agree

violations.message: TaxExclusiveAmount (35000.00) + TaxAmount (8750.00) = 43750.00, but TaxInclusiveAmount is 42000.00. Discrepancy = -1750.00 DKK.
violations.regulatoryRef: Momsbekendtgørelsen § 58 — gross invoice amount must equal net + VAT

violations.message: INV-2024-0088: Sum of line TaxAmounts (7500.00 + 1250.00 = 8750.00) does not match DocumentTotals.TaxPayable (7000.00). Discrepancy = -1750.00 DKK.
violations.regulatoryRef: SAF-T krav (Skattestyrelsen) — header totals must reconcile with line-level detail

violations.message: INV-2024-0088: NetTotal (35000.00) + TaxPayable (7000.00) = 42000.00, which matches GrossTotal (42000.00) — but TaxPayable itself is incorrect (see SAFT-T1-007). Gross is internally consistent at the wrong value.
violations.regulatoryRef: SAF-T krav (Skattestyrelsen) — gross total integrity is contingent on correct TaxPayable

violations.message: INV-2024-0088: NetTotal (35000.00) + TaxPayable (8750.00) = 43750.00, but GrossTotal is 45000.00. Discrepancy = +1250.00 DKK.
INV-2024-0088 Line 1: TaxCode=MVA25 (rate 0.25), TaxBase=30000.00 → expected TaxAmount=7500.00, but actual is 4500.00. Effective rate = 0.15. Discrepancy = -3000.00 DKK.
violations.regulatoryRef: Momslovens § 33 — MVA25 transactions must apply the 25% standard rate

violations.message: INV-2024-0088: Sum of corrected line TaxAmounts = 7500.00 + 1250.00 = 8750.00, but DocumentTotals.TaxPayable is 5750.00. Discrepancy = -3000.00 DKK.
violations.regulatoryRef: SAF-T krav (Skattestyrelsen) — header totals must reconcile with line-level detail

violations.message: INV-2024-0088: InvoiceDate 2024-06-10 falls outside the declared reporting period (2024-01-01 to 2024-03-31). Invoice belongs in Q2 2024 SAF-T.
violations.regulatoryRef: Momslovens § 57 — VAT must be reported in the period in which the tax point arises

violations.message: INV-2024-0088 Line 1: NetAmount (30000.00) + TaxAmount (7500.00) = 37500.00, but GrossAmount is 39000.00. Discrepancy = +1500.00 DKK.
violations.regulatoryRef: SAF-T krav (Skattestyrelsen) — line GrossAmount must equal NetAmount + TaxAmount

violations.message: INV-2024-0088: NetTotal (35000.00) + TaxPayable (8750.00) = 43750.00, but GrossTotal is 45250.00. Discrepancy = +1500.00 DKK.
